name: NavigationMenu
description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

api.name: NavigationMenu
api.description: Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

parameters.name: Label
parameters.description: Accessible name for the <nav> landmark. Defaults to "Main".

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Controlled value of the currently-open item. Bind with @bind-Value/ValueChanged. The value matches the open Value (or its auto id when none is set); null means no submenu is open. Leave unset for uncontrolled use.

parameters.name: ValueChanged
parameters.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

parameters.name: DefaultValue
parameters.description: Initial open item for uncontrolled use (ignored once Value is bound). null (default) opens nothing.

parameters.name: DelayDuration
parameters.description: Grace window in milliseconds before a hovered submenu closes after the pointer leaves it. Radix's forgiveness delay: moving between adjacent triggers, or briefly slipping off the panel, does not immediately dismiss. Defaults to 150ms.

events.name: ValueChanged
events.description: Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

records.name: NavigationMenuContext
records.signature: NavigationMenuContext(string? ActiveItemId, EventCallback<string?> SetActiveItemId, NavigationMenu Owner, int CloseDelayMs)

examples.title: Default
examples.code:
Getting Started
Introduction Learn the basics of building with Lumeo. Installation Add Lumeo to your Blazor project.
Components
Button Trigger actions or navigation events.
Documentation

examples.title: Simple Links
examples.code:
<NavigationMenu>
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Home</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">About</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Blog</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuLink Href="#" Class="...">Contact</NavigationMenuLink>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

examples.title: With Badge
examples.code:
<NavigationMenu>
    <NavigationMenuList>
        <NavigationMenuItem>
            <NavigationMenuTrigger>Products</NavigationMenuTrigger>
            <NavigationMenuContent>
                <NavigationMenuLink Href="#">
                    <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">Analytics</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Badge>New</Badge>
                    </Flex>
                </NavigationMenuLink>
                <NavigationMenuLink Href="#">
                    <Flex Align="center" Gap="2">
                        <Lumeo.Text As="span" Size="sm" Weight="medium">API</Lumeo.Text>
                        <Badge Variant="Badge.BadgeVariant.Secondary">Beta</Badge>
                    </Flex>
                </NavigationMenuLink>
            </NavigationMenuContent>
        </NavigationMenuItem>
    </NavigationMenuList>
</NavigationMenu>

parameters.name: Value
parameters.description: Stable identity for this item, used by the controlled Value binding to say which item is open. When unset an auto id is used, so uncontrolled menus keep working unchanged.

records.name: NavigationMenuItemContext
records.signature: NavigationMenuItemContext(string ItemId, string TriggerId, string ContentId)

parameters.name: IsActive
parameters.description: When true, the link is the user's current location and is rendered with aria-current="page". Lets screen-reader users identify the active item in a nav landmark.

mdSummary:
# NavigationMenu

Top-level site nav with animated dropdown panels.

**Package:** `Lumeo` · **Category:** Navigation
**Docs:** https://lumeo.nativ.sh/components/navigation-menu

## Parameters
| Owner | Name | Type | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| NavigationMenu | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenu | Label | `string` | `"Main"` | Accessible name for the <nav> landmark. Defaults to "Main". |
| NavigationMenu | Value | `string?` | `` | Controlled value of the currently-open item. Bind with @bind-Value/ValueChanged. The value matches the open Value (or its auto id when none is set); null means no submenu is open. Leave unset for uncontrolled use. |
| NavigationMenu | ValueChanged | `EventCallback<string?>` | `` | Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed. |
| NavigationMenu | DefaultValue | `string?` | `` | Initial open item for uncontrolled use (ignored once Value is bound). null (default) opens nothing. |
| NavigationMenu | DelayDuration | `int` | `150` | Grace window in milliseconds before a hovered submenu closes after the pointer leaves it. Radix's forgiveness delay: moving between adjacent triggers, or briefly slipping off the panel, does not immediately dismiss. Defaults to 150ms. |
| NavigationMenu | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenu | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | ItemContext | `NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuContent | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuHamburger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuIndicator | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuItem | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuItem | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuItem | Value | `string?` | `` | Stable identity for this item, used by the controlled Value binding to say which item is open. When unset an auto id is used, so uncontrolled menus keep working unchanged. |
| NavigationMenuItem | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuItem | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | Href | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | IsActive | `bool` | `` | When true, the link is the user's current location and is rendered with aria-current="page". Lets screen-reader users identify the active item in a nav landmark. |
| NavigationMenuLink | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuLink | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuList | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuList | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuList | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | Open | `bool` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | OpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | IsOpen | `bool` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | IsOpenChanged | `EventCallback<bool>` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuMobile | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | ItemContext | `NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuTrigger | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuViewport | Context | `NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext` | `default!` |  |
| NavigationMenuViewport | ChildContent | `RenderFragment?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuViewport | Class | `string?` | `` |  |
| NavigationMenuViewport | AdditionalAttributes | `Dictionary<string, object>?` | `` |  |

## Slots
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenu) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuContent) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuIndicator) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuItem) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuLink) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuList) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuMobile) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuTrigger) — RenderFragment slot
- `ChildContent` (NavigationMenuViewport) — RenderFragment slot

## Events
- `ValueChanged` (`EventCallback<string?>`) — Raised when the open item changes (user hover/click/keyboard, or an item close). Carries the new open item's value, or null when closed.

## Sub-components
- `NavigationMenuContent`, `NavigationMenuHamburger`, `NavigationMenuIndicator`, `NavigationMenuItem`, `NavigationMenuLink`, `NavigationMenuList`, `NavigationMenuMobile`, `NavigationMenuTrigger`, `NavigationMenuViewport`

## Cascading values it expects
- `Context` (`NavigationMenu.NavigationMenuContext`)
- `ItemContext` (`NavigationMenuItem.NavigationMenuItemContext`)

## Services it injects
- `IComponentInteropService` ()
- `ILumeoLocalizer` (Lumeo.Services.Localization)

## Keyboard
- `Escape` — HandleKeyDown handles Escape in NavigationMenuContent.razor

## Example
```razor
<NavigationMenu />
```

## CSS variables
`--color-accent`, `--color-accent-foreground`, `--color-background`, `--color-border`, `--color-popover`, `--color-popover-foreground`, `--color-ring`, `--radius`
